name: Sponge Cake I
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until thick.
2. Add salt, sugar, lemon juice, and rind. Mix well.
3. Sift flour, measure, and sift into a bowl.
4. Gently fold the sifted flour into the egg mixture.
5. Carefully fold in egg whites that have been whipped until they hold their shape.
6. Pour batter into an un-oiled tube pan.
7. Bake in a slow oven (325°F) for about 40 minutes.
The Household Searchlight
